name: runforge
description: Agentic Engineering Harness for safe failure triage.

scripts.dogfood: pnpm check:governance && pnpm check:structure && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm validation:run && pnpm demo:typecheck-failure && pnpm demo:test-failure && pnpm demo:env-config-failure
scripts.demo:run-repo-research: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task repo-research --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Map package scripts" --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-repo-research
scripts.demo:run-context-pack: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task context-pack --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Prepare local context" --log ./fixtures/logs/typecheck-failure.log --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-context-pack
scripts.demo:run-code-proposal: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task code-proposal --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Propose a calculator fix" --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-code-proposal
